package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for rows_iterated_without_rows_err_check: Rows iterated with Next() but without a visible final Rows.Err() check.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario393Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
